notes: v1.14.46 - hold-to-enter charge ring: the landing globe now has a deliberate gloved-tap entry control, restoring entry that has been disabled since v1.14.37 (ENTER_ENABLED still false - the hold is the gate, not the auto-warp). Ported from the phantom-globe prototype, on-brand: a spectrum SVG ring (#pl-hold, cyan->violet->magenta linearGradient #pl-hold-grad) pinned bottom-center over the globe with a 'HOLD' core. Wiring reuses the already-declared-but-dead plumbing: chargeT / CHARGE_S=0.9 / mode='charge'. Interaction: pointerdown (or Enter/Space) charges the ring over 0.9s, release drains it (DRAIN_MULT=3.5), full charge calls the existing startWarp() -> existing zoom-dive + #pl-flash + launch(). The ring ARMS (.pl-armed, opacity 0->1, pointer-events on) only when AUS-01 is online: holdArmable() = (interacted || REDUCED) && online >= ARM_ONLINE(0.85); hint flips 'Spin to come online' -> 'AUS-01 in range - center to lock' -> 'Hold to enter'. Render loop freezes auto-spin during mode==='charge' so the globe holds locked while held. Reduced-motion: confirm-tap (no charge animation), breathe animation guarded off. No-WebGL fallback (tap-to-enter) unchanged - ring stays inert there. NOT touched: the WebGL network (15 hubs / 18 arcs / 36 packets / cyan beacons), the warp pipeline, ENTER_ENABLED, the dead .enter-circle and .pl-dock 'SEAT THE LINK' CSS (parked). Globe footprint unchanged (15 hubs; the prototype's 22-site list is a separate future data-only extension). Gates: node --check inline + sw.js PASS, three stamps lockstep v1.14.46, sw cache bumped, CSS braces balanced (+13/+13), dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. RUNTIME-VERIFIED via agent-browser. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone, full close+reopen to clear SW cache): spin AUS-01 online, confirm the ring arms + 'HOLD' fills + warps into the app; tune ARM_ONLINE / CHARGE_S / ring size from device.
